strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages (Java, JavaScript, Python, C++) which aligns with general software engineering fundamentals.
Strong experience with full-stack development, demonstrated by projects using React, Node.js, Express.js and related backend technologies.
Cloud deployment experience using AWS (EC2, ECS, ECR, Cognito), Docker, and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions which are highly sought after.
Experience with both relational (SQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle SQL, SQLite) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, DynamoDB) meets the demand for data skills.
Familiarity with RESTful API development for Microservices.

gaps.skill: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related field
gaps.action: Long-term: Seneca's degree completion pathway or Athabasca University's online CS degree are options — or prioritize roles that accept diplomas + experience.
Complete the free TypeScript handbook at typescriptlang.org (~8 hrs) and convert one existing JS project to TS.

gaps.skill: Mobile Development (Swift/Kotlin) in iOS or Android
gaps.action: Complete a course on Swift or Kotlin (e.g., Codecademy, Udemy), build a basic mobile app, and add it to your GitHub portfolio.
Explicitly highlight your knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming principles on your resume, drawing connections to your project implementations.
Prioritize applying for junior-level roles and highlight internship/project experience to demonstrate practical skills relevant to the job requirements.

uniqueValue: Experience with JavaFX, a less common UI framework, may be appealing to older projects/companies.
Specific cloud deployment experience with Dockerized applications and secure Authentication (Basic Auth & Cognito JWT).
